title: croton aubrevillei
intro: Croton aubrevillei, also known as Aubreville's croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family. It is native to the tropical forests of West Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Croton aubrevillei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, and it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies.
